---
title: "End of 2025: 2,543 Miles, 342 Days, Six PRs"
description: "End-of-year retrospective: 2,543.3 miles in 2025 across 342 days; PRs at every distance from 5K to 50K."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-12-31"
categories: [running, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch the end-of-year run on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/LZhaVOLnfzY)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Here is my end-of-year run, a relaxed 7-miler on the beautiful Sammamish River Trail!

Looking back at 2025: I ran 2,543.3 miles (4,093 km), 7% up from 2024. I ran on 342 of 365 days (including Jan 1 and Dec 31), and I'm on a 123-week streak since August 2023. I also set PRs at 5K (21:11), 10K (44:16), 15K (1:09:25), half marathon (1:39:07), marathon (3:25:52), and 50K (4:47:35).

For 2026, I'm targeting 2,500 miles (~48 mi/week), with plans to run 1 ultra, 3 full marathons, 2+ half marathons, 1+ 10K, and 30+ Parkrun 5K races. I also want to extend my max distance from 35.28mi to 40mi.

Next up: [Bridle Trails 50K Winter Race](../20260112-bridle-trails-50k/) on Jan 10. Onward!

[Watch the run →](https://youtu.be/LZhaVOLnfzY)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-activity-7412315483519037440-AbMT).*
